name: The Brew Corner Café
welcome_message:
Hey there! ☕ Welcome to The Brew Corner. What can I help you with?

Ask me about:
• Menu & prices
• Timings
• Table reservations
• Location

faqs.question: Menu & Prices
faqs.response:
☕ *The Brew Corner Menu Highlights:*

*Hot Beverages*
   Espresso — ₹99
   Cappuccino — ₹149
   Latte — ₹169
   Masala Chai — ₹79

*Cold Beverages*
   Cold Brew — ₹199
   Iced Mocha — ₹189
   Frappé — ₹179

*Bites*
   Croissant — ₹129
   Avocado Toast — ₹249
   Pasta — ₹299

Full menu available at our counter! 🍽️

faqs.question: Table Reservation
faqs.response:
🪑 Want to reserve a table? We'd love to have you!

For groups of 4+, reservations are recommended.
For smaller groups, walk-ins are always welcome! 😊

faqs.question: Timings
faqs.response:
⏰ *The Brew Corner Timings:*

📅 Monday–Friday: 8:00 AM – 10:00 PM
📅 Saturday–Sunday: 9:00 AM – 11:00 PM

Perfect for your morning coffee or a late-night study session! ✨

faqs.question: Location
faqs.response:
📍 Find us at:
*12 Coffee Street, Indiranagar, Bangalore*

Near the 100 Feet Road junction. Look for our chalkboard sign! ☕
